Case Study • Various

How we helped Growlity Innaugurates Its New Sustainable Green Office

The Challenge

Detailed inside.

Our Solution

Detailed inside.

The Results

Detailed inside.

Growlity, a global leader in ESG and business sustainability management advisory services, proudly announces the launch of its newly designed office space at Surat, India, based on green building concepts, reflecting the company’s unwavering commitment to environmental responsibility, innovation, and employee well-being. The office embodies modern sustainability practices through its use of green-certified and eco-friendly materials across all aspects of construction and design.

A Step Towards a Greener Future

Growlity new office is a testament of our dedication to reducing our greenhouse gas (carbon) footprint. Every element of the workspace has been thoughtfully designed to promote sustainability, energy efficiency, and employee well-being. From construction materials to daily operations, our green office sets new standards in corporate environmental stewardship. The new Growlity office is a manifestation of sustainable interior design, featuring eco-friendly materials, energy-efficient solutions, and a biophilic design that seamlessly integrates nature into the workspace.

Sustainable Building Materials

From responsibly sourced and workstation furniture to low-VOC paints to GreenPro certified carpets and recycled materials, every element of the office has been carefully chosen to minimize environmental impact while fostering a healthy and productive work environment. Our office is constructed using environmentally friendly and sustainable materials, ensuring a minimal ecological impact.

Energy Efficiency & Natural Lighting for Enhanced Well-being

With Green building concepts architectural design, our office maximizes natural lighting, minimizing the need for artificial illumination during the day time, which has resulted to reduce around 70% of our electricity consumption as compared to other conventional offices. Additionally, energy-efficient 5 star rated appliances, air conditioning systems, and cutting edge technology in LED lighting and fans, internet and surveillance systems have been incorporated to optimize power usage and promote sustainability while maintaining a comfortable working environment.

Water & Waste Management

We have incorporated sustainable water fixtures that enhance efficiency and significantly reduce water waste. Additionally, from the beginning of this office we have implemented zero waste management system that emphasizes recycling and responsible disposal of materials.

Paperless Office

Since our inception in 2020, Growlity operates as a paperless company, eliminating the use of paper in all our operations globally. We never practice to give or receive paper based visiting cards. Our team members never use even paper based diary in day to day work. By leveraging digital solutions, we enhance efficiency, reduce waste, and contribute to environmental conservation. Our commitment to a paperless workplace aligns with our broader sustainability goals, reinforcing our dedication to a greener future.

Raw & Minimalist Ceiling Design

As part of our sustainable design approach, we have chosen to keep the ceiling raw, exposing the concrete. This not only reduces the use of additional materials but also enhances the industrial aesthetic of the workspace, promoting a unique and eco-conscious architectural design.

A Collaborative and Dynamic Team Environment

Growlity’s office layout has been thoughtfully designed to encourage collaboration, innovation, and teamwork. Open workspaces, creative brainstorming zones, and dedicated sustainability research areas enable team members to share ideas and drive impactful solutions. Ergonomic seating, breakout spaces, cafeteria, pantry, game zone and greenery-infused workstations further enhance comfort and efficiency, making it an ideal setting for sustainable business growth.

New Office Inauguration Celebrated with Team Members Family

We had the pleasure of inviting and celebrating the first day in our new office with the families of our team members, creating a warm and joyful atmosphere. It was a special moment where we not only marked the beginning of a new journey but also strengthened our bond as an extended family. Seeing the pride and happiness on the faces of our team members and their loved ones made the occasion even more meaningful. Their presence added an emotional touch, reminding us that our success is a shared achievement built on support, dedication, and togetherness.

Leading by Example in Sustainable Business Practices

As an ESG and Sustainability advisory company, Growlity believes in practicing what it preaches. By integrating sustainability into our workspace, Growlity aims to inspire businesses to adopt greener practices. Our new office is a living example of how modern workspaces can be both aesthetically appealing and environmentally responsible yet cost efficient – A Model for Sustainable Workspaces.

Speaking about the new office, Dr. Nitin Dumasia, President & CEO of Growlity, stated: “Sustainability is at the heart of Growlity’s vision. Our new office is a step towards a greener future, where innovation and responsibility go hand in hand. This space reflects our commitment to creating a healthier planet while fostering an efficient and inspiring work environment.”

About Growlity

Growlity is a leading sustainability advisory firm specializing in ESG and sustainability advisory, Platinum rated EcoVadis Training Partner, Sustainability Reporting Expertise, GHG-Carbon footprint assessments and verification, Rating and Disclosures, and sustainable business solutions. With a global presence, the company empowers organizations to integrate responsible practices into their operations, driving long-term success and environmental stewardship.

Connect with our experts and let’s build a greener future together!

For media, please reach out to us at contact@growlity.com
